# Unicode

Quotes: "Hi" and 'Hi'.

## Multilingual URLs

<http://测.com?测=测>

[foo](/bar/测?x=测 "title")

<测@foo.测.baz>

Here is some unicode:

- I hat: Î
- o umlaut: ö
- section: §
- set membership: ∈
- copyright: ©

Term

:   ```
    ├── pyproject.toml
    ├── .python-version
    └── hello.py
    ```

| αβγ   | 😀    | 測試 |
